operating_ranges.evidence: Max. cooling water outlet temperature: 50 celsius
Max. cooling water inlet pressure: 5 bar(e)
Between 2 and 7 degrees celsius above the relevant temperature in Fig. 3.4

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Keep the coolers clean to maintain the cooling efficiency

fault_conditions.name: condensate_formation
fault_conditions.description: condensate formation during frequent unloading periods
fault_conditions.evidence: Consult Atlas Copco if condensate should be formed during frequent unloading periods

maintenance_actions.name: cooler_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove any dirt from the coolers with a fibre brush. Never use a wire brush or metal objects. Then clean by air jet in reverse direction of normal flow

assumptions.statement: Air cooler is part of the after-cooling system that reduces compressed air temperature
assumptions.reason: Manual discusses after-coolers in context of water separation and energy recovery systems

assumptions.statement: Cooling water flow regulation affects air cooler performance
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies regulation of cooling water flow to obtain suitable temperature at compressor element outlet
